eligibility_rules.boundary_note: No source retrieval is performed and No actual citation is added.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Peer-reviewed conceptual or methodological source on governance pipelines, claim control, research workflow governance, or safety-bounded reporting.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude editorials without method relevance, unverifiable webpages, fabricated references, and sources that imply real-biological operational capability.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must directly support governance-pipeline positioning without implying biological validation or submission readiness.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Peer-reviewed source on overclaiming, research integrity, reporting discipline, reproducibility language, or evidence-boundary management.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that only discuss generic writing advice without evidence-boundary or integrity relevance.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must help justify why proposal, draft, evidence, validation, and readiness language should remain separated.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, and no operational targeting are introduced.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Methodological source on toy models, abstract models, simulation boundaries, non-operational evaluation design, or scope-limited research artifacts.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude real biological datasets, real pathogen models, receptor-parameter sources, and operational targeting sources.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support the legitimacy of synthetic, abstract, unitless, non-operational toy-only scoping.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Lineage support remains a citation need, not evidence completion.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on staged workflows, artifact lineage, traceability, software process governance, or reproducible artifact tracking.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that claim artifact lineage alone proves correctness, safety, performance, or readiness.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support staged artifact lineage or traceability without converting lineage into validation.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Zero counters are governance controls only.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on safety cases, assurance arguments, invariant checking, governance controls, or zero-counter style control checks.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that would allow zero counters to be described as proof, external validation, or readiness approval.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support the use of explicit invariants or assurance-style control logic.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Deferred claims remain deferred and prohibited claims remain prohibited.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on evidence grading, claim classification, responsible reporting, validation language, or research integrity.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that collapse deferred claims into completed claims or turn prohibited claims into promises.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support the separation of allowed, deferred, and prohibited claims.

eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on evidence mapping, gap registers, validation planning, roadmap discipline, or transparent limitation tracking.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources used to claim that citation integration, proof, validation, or readiness is already complete.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support gap mapping or evidence-roadmap framing without implying gap closure.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Toy evaluation is designed but not executed.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on evaluation design, toy metrics, traceability metrics, reproducibility checks, or planned non-operational evaluation.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that would be used to imply executed evaluation, performance, scores, or validation outcomes.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support evaluation design or metric planning without reporting results.

eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on scientific writing structure, argumentation, reviewer-facing narrative, coherence, transparent limitation framing, or future-work sequencing.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that would be used as permission to apply a rewrite in this milestone.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support narrative coherence or limitation framing without authorizing manuscript mutation.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Manuscript submission ready count remains zero.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on limitation transparency, validation boundaries, non-readiness statements, or responsible evidence restraint.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources that soften or remove non-readiness, non-validation, non-proof, or non-evidence statements.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support transparent non-readiness and non-validation language.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Wet-lab protocol count and actionable biosafety-risk instruction count remain zero.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on safe research boundaries, dual-use risk management, non-operational research framing, or safety exclusion language.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources containing wet-lab protocols, actionable biosafety-risk instructions, real-world infectivity optimization, immune evasion optimization, or host range prediction.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support the need for explicit exclusions without introducing operational content.

eligibility_rules.boundary_note: Future work may only introduce stronger claims after separately audited milestones.
eligibility_rules.eligible_source_profile: Source on staged validation, responsible claim escalation, reproducible artifact packages, or roadmap discipline.
eligibility_rules.exclusion_rule: Exclude sources used to imply citation integration, evaluation execution, readiness, proof, or validation has already happened.
eligibility_rules.minimum_acceptance_rule: A future source must support sequencing of future work without implying future work has already occurred.
